purpose: Execa is a library for process execution in JavaScript, optimized for programmatic usage beyond shell commands.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for testing and building.

key_files.name: readme.md
key_files.role: Provides documentation, installation instructions, and usage examples.

key_files.name: tsconfig.json
key_files.role: Specifies the TypeScript compiler options and project configuration.

purpose: Contains core project files, configuration, and utility modules for setup, builds, and handling streams and processes.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview and documentation for the project

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for building and testing

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Contains the licensing information for the project

key_files.name: fixtures/all-fail.js
key_files.role: Fixture that simulates a failed process.

key_files.name: helpers/convert.js
key_files.role: Utility functions for converting data and handling streams.

concerns: Readme is outdated and needs update with recent changes.
Some dependencies in package.json are deprecated.
No tests are defined in the package.json scripts.
Fixtures should be tested to ensure proper behavior.
Stream utilities may require additional documentation.

purpose: This branch contains tests related to stdio options in execa, and overall configuration and metadata files for the project.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Metadata and dependency management for the project.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for project setup and usage.

key_files.name: .gitignore
key_files.role: Specifies files to be ignored by version control.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Defines the legal terms for using the project.

key_files.name: stdio/array.test-d.ts
key_files.role: Tests various stdio configurations for execa and execaSync.

key_files.name: stdio/direction.test-d.ts
key_files.role: Tests stdio options using Readable and Writable streams.

key_files.name: return/ignore-option.test-d.ts
key_files.role: Tests handling of 'ignore' stdio options in execa.

key_files.name: return/ignore-other.test-d.ts
key_files.role: Tests other ignore configurations for stdio in execa.

concerns: Missing tests for several core functionalities.
Multiple tests expect errors for invalid stdio configurations.
Some imported dependencies in package.json have no usage in the codebase.
TODO comments indicating unfinished features in README.md.
Expected types in tests showing properties should match the actual output from execa.

purpose: Contains utility functions for inter-process communication, command handling, and option merging, essential for various library functionalities.

key_files.name: ipc/array.js
key_files.role: Defines a function to normalize stdio array with IPC

key_files.name: ipc/buffer-messages.js
key_files.role: Handles and processes IPC messages

key_files.name: methods/bind.js
key_files.role: Merges options with specific handling for deep options

key_files.name: methods/command.js
key_files.role: Parses command strings for command execution

concerns: No tests found for IPC message handling functions.
Potential for TypeError if command string parsing fails.
Unused arguments in command parsing may lead to runtime errors.

purpose: Contains TypeScript definition files for subprocess execution, error handling, and command execution methods.

key_files.name: final-error.d.ts
key_files.role: Defines common error types for subprocess execution.

key_files.name: ignore.d.ts
key_files.role: Defines logic for handling ignored outputs in subprocess.

key_files.name: command.d.ts
key_files.role: Provides commands execution methods and their signatures.

key_files.name: main-async.d.ts
key_files.role: Contains the main async execution methods and their behavior.

concerns: No tests observed for the defined types and methods.
Missing implementation details for some asynchronous behavior.
Abundant comments but lacks examples for edge cases.
Potential dead code if any of these methods are unused.
No validation or error handling shown for command inputs.

purpose: Aggregate folder for miscellaneous documentation, media, and GitHub workflows.

key_files.name: docs/api.md
key_files.role: API reference documenting various methods, options, and subprocess properties.

key_files.name: docs/bash.md
key_files.role: Documentation on differences between Bash and Execa, highlighting the benefits of using Execa.

key_files.name: .github/codecov.yml
key_files.role: Configuration file for Codecov, managing code coverage reports.

key_files.name: .github/security.md
key_files.role: Security policy documentation for reporting vulnerabilities.

key_files.name: media/logo.sketch
key_files.role: Design file for the logo present in the documentation.
